headings.usage: All page titles, section headers, and report titles. Must use tight tracking.

body.usage: UI elements, dashboard data, buttons, inputs.

timeline.structure: Central vertical line with alternating or left-aligned cards. Each card represents an event/evidence.

report.container: max-w-[210mm] mx-auto bg-white shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-[20mm] min-h-[297mm]

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900/10 focus:border-slate-900 transition-all outline-none

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise texture on the sidebar background to reduce digital flatness.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/crimson-pro' and '@fontsource/manrope' to package.json immediately.
THEME: Use a 'Light Mode' first approach. Dark mode should be a 'Night Mode' (deep slate, not black).
TIMELINE: Build a custom vertical timeline component. Do not use a generic list. It must look like a chronological legal sequence.
REPORTS: The 'Barrister Presentation View' must look like a printed legal brief. Use serif fonts, generous margins, and clear section numbering.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
NAVIGATION: Sidebar navigation is preferred over top nav for this dashboard to allow quick switching between cases.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure high contrast for all text. Legal documents must be legible.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. No centered text on dashboards.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. Legal data is dense; spacing makes it readable.
Micro-interactions are mandatory. Hover states on every row/card.
Do not use 'Inter' font. Use Manrope for UI and Crimson Pro for Headings.
